hero.title: Proof from real systems.
copy: This portfolio reflects work shaped by banking, consulting, AI-era product teams, and resilient software delivery. It includes open-source tools, internal platforms, and client systems built for availability, security, maintainability, and change.
The point is not novelty. It is evidence of judgement — across architecture, delivery, and systems that need to keep working after launch.
